sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81127" key="periaxuri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιᾰχῠρίζω</orth>, <sense id="n81127.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">free from husks</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dieuch.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:4:7:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.7.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
